subject: a barbed chain snapping taut across the arena — a fast metallic whip-crack and rattle
prompt: Close-mic'd barbed iron chain snapping taut: sharp metallic whip-crack, immediate high-frequency bite, brief metallic ring and chaotic clinking as links rattle, gritty sand hiss under impact; fast one-shot, 0.6–0.8s, ends with dusty decay.
